title: Smoky New Potatoes
description: A simple recipe showcasing the flavors of smoky new potatoes, perfect as a side dish or snack.
instructions: Wash the new potatoes thoroughly, then dry them with a paper towel.
Cut the potatoes into 1-inch (2.5 cm) wedges or small chunks.
Place the potatoes on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle the olive oil over the potatoes and sprinkle with salt, black pepper, and garlic powder (if using).
Toss the potatoes to coat evenly with the seasoning mixture.
Roast the potatoes in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until they're tender and lightly browned.
Remove the potatoes from the oven and let them cool slightly.
